heading: Index Definition
body:
The following tabs contain sample index definitions for the
`edgeGram`, `rightEdgeGram`, and `nGram`
[tokenization](bson-data-types-autocomplete).
In addition to the [tokenization](bson-data-types-autocomplete) type,
the sample index definitions include the [string](bson-data-types-string)
and [token](bson-data-types-token) types on the `title` field.

**EdgeGram:**

edgeGram

```javascript
{
  "mappings": {
    "dynamic": false,
    "fields": {
      "title": [
        {
          "type": "token"
        },
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "foldDiacritics": false,
          "maxGrams": 7,
          "minGrams": 3,
          "tokenization": "edgeGram",
          "type": "autocomplete"
        }
      ],
      "plot": [
        {
          "type": "autocomplete",
          "tokenization": "edgeGram",
          "minGrams": 2,
          "maxGrams": 15,
          "foldDiacritics": true
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

**RightEdgeGram:**

rightEdgeGram

```javascript
{
  "mappings": {
    "dynamic": false,
    "fields": {
      "title": [
        {
          "type": "token"
        },
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "foldDiacritics": false,
          "maxGrams": 7,
          "minGrams": 3,
          "tokenization": "rightEdgeGram",
          "type": "autocomplete"
        }
      ],
      "plot": [
        {
          "type": "autocomplete",
          "tokenization": "rightEdgeGram",
          "minGrams": 2,
          "maxGrams": 15,
          "foldDiacritics": true
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

**NGram:**

nGram

```javascript
{
  "mappings": {
    "dynamic": false,
    "fields": {
      "title": [
        {
          "type": "token"
        },
        {
          "type": "string"
        },
        {
          "foldDiacritics": false,
          "maxGrams": 7,
          "minGrams": 3,
          "tokenization": "nGram",
          "type": "autocomplete"
        }
      ],
      "plot": [
        {
          "type": "autocomplete",
          "tokenization": "nGram",
          "minGrams": 2,
          "maxGrams": 15,
          "foldDiacritics": true
        }
      ]
    }
  }
}
```

***

➤ Use the **Select your language** drop-down menu to set the
language of the example on this page.

***

drivers

**Atlas UI:**

Atlas UI

To view and edit query syntax in the Search Tester:

- Click the Query button to the right of the index
  to query.

- Click Edit Query to view a default query
  syntax sample in JSON (Javascript Object Notation) format.

**Shell:**

MongoDB Shell

Run the following command at the [mongosh](mongodb-shell) prompt to use the
`sample_mflix` database:

```shell
use sample_mflix
```

To learn how to run the following queries in the [mongosh](mongodb-shell), see
[Search Tester](atlas-search-queries).

**Compass:**

Compass

To learn how to run the following queries in the MongoDB Compass, see
[Search Tester](atlas-search-queries).
